title: "The Besties" All-In's inaugural award show covering the best, worst & most memorable of 2020

Show Notes:

0:00 The besties discuss some recent beak wetting, open source merch & more

6:31 Chamath tells the "192.5" weight loss bet story

10:54 Biggest Winner - Politics

13:08 Biggest Loser - Politics

16:24 Biggest Winner - Business

19:47 Biggest Loser - Business

23:22 Biggest Winner - Culture

1:12:57 Best Memes

analysis.summary: The All-In podcast hosts their inaugural award show, discussing the best, worst, and most memorable moments of 2020 across various categories. They share their opinions on politics, business, culture, and more. The episode is a lighthearted and humorous take on the year's events.

takeaways.text: Chamath lost a weight loss bet
Politics had a significant impact in 2020
Business winners and losers were discussed
Culture had its biggest winners and losers
The hosts discussed the biggest turnaround of 2020
The biggest flash in the pan was also discussed
The smartest and dumbest moves in business and politics were analyzed

sentiment.notes: The episode has a lighthearted and humorous tone, but also discusses serious topics like politics and business.

notable_moments.description: Chamath tells the 192.5 weight loss bet story
